return(function(V,c,M,l,H,h,w,N,v,u,q,a,b,J,I,Y,r,K,o,Q,S,g,P)S,q,r,g,N,K,b,Q,u,Y,v,o,a,P,J,I={},function()v=(-93443-(-93444))+v I[v]=-77670+77671 return v end,function(V)local i,g=778485+-778484,V[-363537+363538]while g do I[g],i=I[g]-(-750903-(-750904)),i+(-751208-(-751209))if-682476-(-682476)==I[g]then I[g],S[g]=nil,nil end g=V[i]end end,function(g,M,l,H)local
